2606.22493.title: An LLM-Orchestrated Agent for Directional-Coupler Design with Self-Consistent Eigenmode and FDTD Validation
2606.22493.paper_summary: We present a design agent which is a Large Language Model (LLM) that orchestrates, but does not perform, the numerical simulations to design a silicon-on-insulator (SOI) $2\times2$ directional coupler. We choose a symmetric phase-matched coupler where a lot of analytical results are available that help the design strategy. The LLM proposes candidate gap values (a geometrical dimension size) and judges convergence, while all physics is owned by deterministic solvers: a frequency-domain eigenmode solver estimates the coupling coefficient~$κ$ for the current design, and an independent Finite-Difference Time-Domain (FDTD) stage validates it. Both solvers operate on a common slab-projected two-dimensional (2D) effective-index reduction of the silicon film, so the design~$κ$ and the FDTD response are consistent by problem design; the residual between them is shown to be a single constant phase offset~$φ$, attributable to a fixed excess coupling length $L_{\mathrm{extra}}=\SI{2.837(11)}{\micro\meter}$ that we find invariant across a factor-of-two range in~$κ$. Folding this offset into a closed-loop length correction, the agent delivers a $50/50$ splitter whose FDTD-measured cross fraction is $0.498$ (target $0.500$), a residual of $0.0017$. Results are made self-consistent within the 2D effective-index model; and the LLM succeeds in delivering a suitable design over a number of attempts.
2606.22493.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一個設計代理，它是一個大型語言模型（LLM），負責協調但不執行數值模擬，以設計一個矽基絕緣體（SOI）$2\times2$ 方向耦合器。我們選擇了一個對稱相位匹配的耦合器，因為有很多可用的解析結果可以幫助設計策略。LLM 提出候選間隙值（幾何尺寸大小）並判斷收斂，而所有物理則由確定性求解器擁有：頻域特徵模式求解器估算當前設計的耦合係數~$κ$，而獨立的有限差分時域（FDTD）階段則對其進行驗證。這兩個求解器在矽薄膜的共同板投影二維（2D）有效指數減少上運作，因此設計的~$κ$ 和 FDTD 響應在問題設計上是一致的；它們之間的殘差顯示為一個單一的常數相位偏移~$φ$，這歸因於一個固定的過量耦合長度 $L_{\mathrm{extra}}=\SI{2.837(11)}{\micro\meter}$，我們發現它在~$κ$ 的二倍範圍內是不變的。將這個偏移納入閉環長度修正，代理提供了一個 $50/50$ 分配器，其 FDTD 測量的交叉比例為 $0.498$（目標 $0.500$），殘差為 $0.0017$。結果在 2D 有效指數模型中變得自洽；而且 LLM 成功地在多次嘗試中提供了一個合適的設計。
2606.22493.author: Saumya Biswas et.al.
2606.22493.authors: Saumya Biswas, Amrit De, Md Tauhidul Islam
